title: rhynchosia goetzei var. goetzei
intro: Rhynchosia goetzei var. goetzei, commonly known as the Goetze's Rhynchosia or African Kidney Bean, is a perennial legume plant species native to tropical Africa. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to have several health benefits, including the treatment of fever, rheumatism, and other inflammatory conditions. Rhynchosia goetzei var. goetzei is often prepared for medicinal use by making a decoction from its roots and leaves, which can also be consumed as a tea or used in topical applications.
